why_this_action.reasoning: OpenAIToolsHub is an active AI-tool review/directory surface with a coding category and an explicit submission path. Direct curator outreach is executable now and better aligned with the current repair mandate than another Reddit/body rewrite or another owned-content draft.

why_this_action.replacement_condition: If no reply, listing, or measurable Codeberg delta appears by the review window, treat this target as exhausted and replace it with a different untouched curator/domain lane rather than resending the same pitch.
